shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch holding a free student access card — Figma's education program strategy made visual.
assets.caption: Hatch holding a free student access card — Figma's education program strategy made visual.
assets.prompt: Figma's Free-for-Students Program | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with graduation cap and growth arrow) holding an oversized student ID card labeled "FREE ACCESS — Figma for Education" on a cream background. Hatch's expression is knowing and generous — the gift has a long game. No speech bubble. HackProduct wordmark watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.prompt: Figma's Free-for-Students Program | failure-mechanism: Hatch in thinking pose looking at a diagram showing the habit formation window: a bar labeled "School" on the left (ages 20-22), a gap in the middle (ages 23-26), and a bar labeled "Decision Power" on the right (ages 27-30). An arrow bridges the gap. Hatch points at the bridge. Cream background. HackProduct wordmark watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story.
